title: T-109 — UI: GateApprovalModal (gate_approval_modal prototype) NPD-f slice of T-061
prompt:
# T-109 — GateApprovalModal UI

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §17.6, §17.7 + UX prototypes/design/01-NPD-UX.md approval_modal
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/gate-screens.jsx:378-522 (GateApprovalModal)
Parent root: T-061

## Goal
Single Client Component GateApprovalModal (shadcn Dialog): renders project header, gate-transition visual, checklist completion Progress, approve/reject RadioGroup, notes Textarea (min 10 chars), and an e-signature overlay (password Input + confirmation Checkbox) shown only on approve before submit. Calls approveProjectGate or rejectProjectGate Server Action.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/_components/gate-approval-modal.tsx ('use client') uses shadcn Dialog/RadioGroup/RadioGroupItem/Form/Input/Textarea/Checkbox/Button/Badge.
2. Step state machine: 'decision' → (if approve) 'esign' → 'submitted'; (if reject) → 'submitted'.
3. Notes Textarea required (min 10 trimmed chars); decision RadioGroup default 'approve'; on reject decision the gate-transition card shows red dashed arrow.
4. E-signature overlay: type=password Input + confirmation Checkbox; Confirm&Sign disabled until both filled. On confirm calls approveProjectGate({ projectId, gate, decision, password }).
5. Reject path: calls rejectProjectGate({ projectId, gate, reason: notes }).

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/_components/gate-approval-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/_components/__tests__/gate-approval-modal.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given GateApprovalModal renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/gate-screens.jsx:378-522, then it shows the same project header, gate-transition card, checklist Progress, approve/reject RadioGroup and notes Textarea — using shadcn Dialog+RadioGroup+Input+Textarea+Checkbox+Button+Badge primitives.
2. Given decision='approve' and notes.trim().length >= 10, when Submit Approval is clicked, then the e-signature overlay renders with a type=password Input and a confirmation Checkbox; Confirm&Sign is disabled until both are filled and on confirm invokes approveProjectGate.
3. Given decision='reject' and notes.trim().length >= 10, when Submit Rejection is clicked, then rejectProjectGate({ reason: notes }) is invoked exactly once and the password field is NEVER rendered for the reject path.

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/gate-approval-modal.test.tsx asserting parity, e-sig overlay gating (approve only), reject-no-password, decision/notes validation before component exists.
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test gate-approval-modal'

## Risk red lines
- Do not show password value in DOM (Input must be type=password).
- Do not call approveProjectGate without both password and confirmation Checkbox.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
